spec: Detect an off-by-one loop guard that reads one element past array bounds when using <= in a bounded loop.
Refactor status normalization to a concise include check while preserving behavior.
Detect direct SQL string composition in query builder path.
Ensure optional defensive default remains behaviorally unchanged.
Catch missing await for async password hash generation.
Refactor token extraction with equivalent behavior.
Detect a non-strict index comparison that can skip the last element in a pagination loop.
Refactor currency string construction without changing rendering behavior.
Find an off-by-one regression in bulk-sync processing inside a larger messy but otherwise VALID diff.
Refactor shape validation with equivalent safety checks.
Detect missing default method fallback when accepting state-changing request with user-supplied token.
Refactor card rendering to keep output shape and behavior intact.
Find logic that allows negative retries by missing maximum validation.
Refactor router resolution while preserving fallback behavior.
Catch unsafe array indexing without null guard on request path.
Refactor header extraction to use a consistent string slicing primitive.
Detect path traversal by weak prefix check in static route resolver.
Refactor error formatting while keeping the formatter contract unchanged.
Catch insecure fallback that accepts non-numeric user score input.
Refactor cache readback aliasing without changing semantics.
